description: This component takes a float value and a colorX value, and multiplies the float value by the colorX value, and outputs a colorX.

fields.Input: A value that constantly changes to visualize the color for. For example, the ``Volume`` field of a Volume Meter.
fields.MaterialColor: The color to drive with an amplified ``BaseColor`` value based on ``Input``
fields.LightIntensity: How bright the output color is beyond 1 gain.
